name: finsight-demo-corpus
description: 演示语料：模拟截至 2026-06-05 已披露的最新财报/宏观片段（每标的含 is_latest 标记）

documents.content: NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA) Q1 FY2026 (quarter ended Apr 26 2026, released May 28 2026) — LATEST QUARTER. Total revenue $44.8B (+72% YoY). Data Center revenue $39.1B (+87% YoY), ~87% of total revenue. Gross margin GAAP 73.1%. Blackwell Ultra in full production; sovereign-AI and top-4 hyperscaler capex pipelines disclosed. Networking revenue +38% YoY on scale-out AI clusters. Management: supply improving but still allocation-constrained on top SKUs.

NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA) Q3 FY2025 (quarter ended Oct 27 2025, released Nov 2025). Total revenue $35.1B (+94% YoY). Data Center revenue $30.8B (+112% YoY). Gross margin 74.6%. Blackwell architecture demand exceeded supply; H200 ramping, inference mix rising. Used for sequential QoQ compares vs Q1 FY2026.

Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) Q3 FY2026 (quarter ended Mar 31 2026, released Apr 29 2026) — LATEST QUARTER. Total revenue $70.1B (+14% YoY). Intelligent Cloud $32.2B (+22% YoY). Azure and other cloud services +35% YoY (constant currency ~34%). Productivity & Business Processes $29.9B (+11% YoY); More Personal Computing $13.0B (+6% YoY). Commercial cloud gross margin 70%. Copilot paid seats +24% QoQ in Enterprise; AI infra CapEx guided up for FY2026.

Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) FY2025 annual (year ended Jun 30 2025, 10-K filed Aug 2025). Revenue $281.7B (+15% YoY). Intelligent Cloud $137.4B (+22% YoY) for full year; Azure +30% YoY cited in annual letter. Operating income $128.5B. Commercial cloud gross margin 71%. Copilot attach in M365 E5; AI datacenter lease and CapEx elevated.

Apple Inc. (AAPL) FY2025 (fiscal year ended Sep 27 2025, 10-K filed Feb 2026) — LATEST ANNUAL. Revenue $416.2B (+6.4% YoY). Gross margin 46.8%; operating margin 32.1%; EPS $7.08. Services $109.5B (+14% YoY). iPhone $208.4B. R&D $34.0B. On-device Apple Intelligence rollout; India manufacturing share up.

Alphabet Inc. (GOOGL) FY2025 (year ended Dec 31 2025, 10-K filed Feb 2026) — LATEST ANNUAL. Consolidated revenue $402.0B (+15% YoY). Google Cloud $58.0B (+32% YoY). Search resilient; YouTube ads +11%. CapEx $61.0B for TPU/GPU/datacenter. DeepMind model serving costs embedded in Cloud margin discussion.

Amazon.com Inc. (AMZN) FY2025 (year ended Dec 31 2025, 10-K filed Feb 2026) — LATEST ANNUAL. Net sales $691.0B (+8% YoY). AWS $142.0B (+18% YoY) with operating margin expansion. Advertising $68.5B (+19% YoY). North America retail operating margin improved on regional fulfillment.

Amazon Web Services (AMZN segment) Q1 2026 (calendar quarter, AWS ops review Apr 2026) — LATEST AWS QUARTERLY VIEW. AWS revenue $30.2B (+17% YoY). AI workload mix (Trainium/Inferentia + partner GPUs) cited as growth driver; enterprise migration backlog stable.

Federal Reserve FOMC Statement (May 7 2026) — LATEST MACRO. Policy rate 3.75%-4.00% after two 25bp cuts YTD. Core PCE ~2.3%. Unemployment 4.1%. Tariff pass-through risk noted; dot plot implies one more 25bp cut in 2026 H2. QT runoff at reduced pace.

JPMorgan Chase (JPM) Q1 2026 (quarter ended Mar 31 2026) — LATEST QUARTER. Net revenue $44.8B; net income $14.6B. ROTCE 23%. IB fees +9% YoY. NII $24.0B; credit provisions $2.5B. CET1 15.9%. Stable card delinquencies QoQ.

Tesla Inc. (TSLA) Q1 2026 (quarter ended Mar 31 2026) — LATEST QUARTER. Revenue $22.1B. Automotive gross margin 16.8% ex-credits. Deliveries 386k units. Energy storage +31% YoY. Robotaxi pilot cities expanded; AI training capex up for FSD v13.

AI infrastructure demand drivers (synthetic analyst note, as of 2026-06-05): Hyperscaler CapEx remains the primary pull for GPU/accelerator shipments (NVDA). Cloud vendors monetize via metered AI APIs and seat-based copilots (MSFT Azure, AMZN AWS). Compare DC hardware YoY vs cloud service YoY — different layers of the AI stack, not directly interchangeable units.
